Interface IAGSServerConnection3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GISClient
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GISClient.dll

Provides access to members that have information about the GIS server connection..

[Guid("20E6A647-DE9E-4E4C-A301-640B9AB0D143")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IAGSServerConnection3 : IAGSServerConnection2, IAGSServerConnection
